Real storefront/exterior photo of Struijk Acousticon at Kamp 86, Amersfoort — shows the shopfront with "hoortoestellen" signage, the Struijk Acousticon logo, shop windows, entrance doors, and visible house number "86". Landscape 2016x1512, ideal for both 4:5 card and 21:9 detail crops. Verified via GET: HTTP 200, image/jpeg, 437 KB. (Other site photos were portrait staff shots; this exterior is the strongest cover.)

source: assets.plaece.nl (Tijd voor Amersfoort / Visit Amersfoort photo CDN) via the DHome de winkel listing at tijdvooramersfoort.nl/nl/locaties/3552999928/dhome-de-winkel
note: Replaced the logo candidate (dhome.nl/img/DHome-logo.jpg is a brand mark) with a real, high-resolution interior photo of the DHome store. The shop's own website only serves heavily downscaled images (max 274x400px). This photo from the Tijd voor Amersfoort listing shows the store interior — clothing racks, styled product shelving (shoes, vases, art), and the owner arranging goods — ideal for the Interieur & kunst category. Verified via GET: HTTP 200, content-type image/jpeg, 4000x2667px, 1.2MB. Suits both the 4:5 card and 21:9 detail crops. A 960x640 CDN-resized variant is also available if a smaller file is preferred.

Genuine interior photo of a HappyFood location: branded green ordering counter with staff serving a customer and a HappyBurger on the counter. Verified HTTP/2 200, content-type image/png, 1704095 bytes, 1024x1024. The Kamp-76-specific website (cafetariahappyfood-amersfoort.nl), Thuisbezorgd, and mymenuweb only exposed logos/placeholders; no Plaece candidate existed. This is a real on-brand interior photo (not a logo), but it is from the brand-wide site and not confirmed to be the Kamp 76 location specifically. Strong alternatives if a different shot is preferred (both verified 200, 1024x1024 real photos): https://happyfood.nl/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/HappyFood-Patat.png (kitchen/fryer interior, staff frying fresh fries) and https://happyfood.nl/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/HappyBurgers-1.png (product shot).

source: assets.plaece.nl — hero image on the official Visit Amersfoort / tijdvooramersfoort.nl listing for Glitter en Glas
note: Genuine professional photo (Sony A7III, edited in Lightroom; original dsc09229 is 2048x1365). Same image is the hero on the official Visit Amersfoort listing for the business. Not a logo. Verified HTTP 200, content-type image/jpeg. Used the 960px-wide CDN render for good resolution across both the 4:5 card and 21:9 detail crops. Business website found: glasinloodkunstenaar.nl (a.k.a. glitterenglas.nl), a stained-glass studio/art shop at Achter de Kamp 32.

Kept the candidate on file. Verified as a genuine high-quality photo of Anna and her team (filename "foto-anna-en-team"), shot on a Nikon Z 7II (original 8256x5504, served at 1024x683). curl returns HTTP 200; the CDN serves it with content-type application/octet-stream rather than image/*, but the downloaded bytes are a valid JPEG confirmed by both `file` and PIL. Well above the 600px minimum and a real photo, not a logo — best available image, no better source needed.

source: destadamersfoort.nl advertorial "Belhadi van markt naar winkel" (https://www.destadamersfoort.nl/lokaal/zakelijk/373855/-advertorial-belhadi-van-markt-naar-winkel-veel-klanten-maken-z) — press photo of owner Belhadi inside his fabric shop at Kamp 63
note: Real photo of owner Belhadi standing inside his Belhadi Modestoffen fabric shop at Kamp 63, holding up a floral fabric with shelves/walls full of rolled fabrics behind him — shows the actual store interior and product. Verified via curl HEAD and full GET: HTTP/2 200, content-type image/jpeg, content-length 414969, decoded as 1919x1129 JPEG. The business's own website (belhadimodestoffen.nl) is offline (NXDOMAIN, domain expired) so no og:image exists there. The tijdvooramersfoort/assets.plaece.nl thumbnails returned 200 on HEAD but 403 Forbidden on real GET (signed/hotlink-protected expiring URLs) and one was a 'schermafbeelding' (screenshot), so they were rejected. An alternative market-stall photo at uwmarktspecialist.nl was a real photo but had a 'uwmarktspecialist.nl' watermark and showed his former outdoor market stall rather than the Kamp 63 shop, so the shop-interior photo was preferred. Landscape orientation suits both the 4:5 card crop and 21:9 detail banner.

Kept the candidate on file — it is a genuine, high-quality real photo, not a logo. Verified via curl: HTTP/2 200, content-type image/jpeg, 285KB. Dimensions 709x709 px. EXIF confirms it is an original photo (Nikon D200, description "Amersfoort", 2009, edited in Photoshop CS3). The image shows the shop interior with hand-painted decorative plates, ceramic vases, and artisanal goods — appropriate for a Winkels & makers business. Suitable for both 4:5 card and 21:9 detail crops.

Kept the candidate on file — it is a genuine, high-quality professional photo, not a logo. Verified: HTTP 200, content-type image/jpeg, 2048x1365 px. Sourced from the assets.plaece.nl CDN (the Visit-Amersfoort/tijdvooramersfoort photo source). Suitable for both the 4:5 card and 21:9 detail-page cover.

Kept the candidate on file. It is a genuine listing photo from the Visit-Amersfoort photo CDN (odp-ubase/image path, filename eigenaar8-ministore_14425217.jpg), not a logo. Verified: HTTP/2 200, content-type image/jpeg, content-length ~39.7KB, 650x366px. fit=cover.

Kept the candidate on file: it is a genuine interior photo of KoKo de verzamelwinkel showing the owner behind a large glass jewelry display case with shelves of collectibles/merchandise in the background — a perfect fit for the Mode & sieraden category. Verified: HTTP/2 200, content-type image/png, 841674 bytes, 796x598px. source: Tijd voor Amersfoort official listing (assets.plaece.nl CDN) - https://www.tijdvooramersfoort.nl/nl/locaties/352130398/orium-goudsmeden ; underlying file odp-ubase/image/dsc09250_3465124821.jpg

source: Tijd voor Amersfoort (Visit-Amersfoort) official listing for Kapsalon René Benoît, served via the assets.plaece.nl photo CDN. High-res (1900px) JPEG of the same hero/og:image photo used on the business's official tijdvooramersfoort.nl listing page (https://www.tijdvooramersfoort.nl/nl/locaties/434115988/kapsalon-rene-benoit-kapsalon).
note: Genuine professional EXTERIOR/storefront photo of the salon — shows the ornate hanging sign reading "René Bénoît KAPSALON" and the blue "1 E" house-number plaque on the historic Amersfoort facade with black shutters, confirming it is this exact business at Grote Sint Jansstraat 1-E. Source filename dsc09260 (DSC camera file) with Exif data confirms a real photograph, not a logo. VERIFIED via GET: HTTP/2 200, content-type image/jpeg, content-length 300957, decoded 1900x1266px. The CDN returns 200 to HEAD/GET with a browser UA; an unrelated earlier signed URL had a stale token but this width:1900 URL (and the og:image) load cleanly. This is the Visit-Amersfoort/tijdvooramersfoort sanctioned photo CDN, which the task rules explicitly accept for genuine photos. The business has no own website/og:image of its own. Crops well to both 4:5 (card) and 21:9 (hero) since subject (sign) is upper-left and the gravity is smart-cropped. fit=cover.

source: Official VVV Amersfoort (Visit Amersfoort) listing for Il diVino Wijnwinkel Amersfoort (vvvamersfoort.nl/nl/ildivinoamersfoort), hosted on static-vvvamersfoort.mypoiworld.com
note: Real, high-quality landscape photo (1920x1080) of a wine tasting — wine being poured into glasses with guests at the table — a fitting signature scene for this wine shop. Verified HTTP 200, content-type image/jpeg. Chosen over the candidate on file (cdn.myonlinestore.eu cat_winkels.jpg), which is only a 569x267 category banner, and over the only other VVV image, which is a hand-drawn illustration of the storefront with baked-in 'Amersfoort' text (not a real photo). The business's own website exposes only small product thumbnails (~400x400) and 270x105 store-team thumbnails with no larger versions. Crops cleanly to both 4:5 and 21:9. The 'xl.jpg' suffix yields the largest available size; '/s.jpg' is a smaller variant.
